title: Important Update Notice
message:
Dear Viumo User,

An upcoming Viumo update (Version 1.0.6) will introduce important improvements to downloads, storage handling, and overall app stability.

As part of these changes, previously downloaded offline content may be cleared after updating. Your Downloads and Library sections may appear empty once the new version is installed.

If you currently have movies or series downloaded for offline viewing, we recommend finishing them before updating to Version 1.0.6.

After updating, you may need to download your offline content again using the improved download system.

We also recommend ensuring your device has enough free storage space before installing the update.

Thank you for supporting Viumo as we continue improving your streaming experience.
